emails.subject: Re: Enron-EGC Peaking Report
emails.body: Re: Enron-EGC Peaking Report Do you actually have the Henwood report. It looks like you sent me the RW Beck report or a letter pertaining to the Henwood report, but not the actual Henwood report that I was looking at in the meeting. Thanks! Ben
